hero.subtitle: Tennisclub Kaiserstuhl
hero.title: BÖTZINGEN
hero.tagline: Playing tennis at the foot of the Kaiserstuhl – since 1975
about.label: About us
about.title: Welcome to TCK Bötzingen
about.text: For over 45 years, Tennisclub Kaiserstuhl Bötzingen has been the premier destination for tennis in the region. With modern facilities, dedicated coaches and a vibrant community, we offer everything a tennis enthusiast could wish for.
offer.label: Offers
offer.title: What we offer
offer.hall.title: Tennis Hall
offer.hall.desc: Two indoor courts for year-round playing pleasure in any weather.
offer.teams.title: Teams
offer.teams.desc: Active teams in all age groups – from juniors to seniors.
offer.training.title: Training
offer.training.desc: Professional coaching for beginners and advanced players of all ages.
offer.clubhouse.title: Clubhouse
offer.clubhouse.desc: Cozy clubhouse with terrace and view of the courts.
offer.booking.title: Court Booking
offer.booking.desc: Easy online booking for all courts – anytime, anywhere.
offer.fanshop.title: Fan Shop
offer.fanshop.desc: Club clothing and accessories in the official TCK fan shop.
events.label: Events
events.title: Upcoming Events
cta.title: Become a Member
cta.text: Join our tennis family and enjoy all the benefits of membership at TCK Bötzingen.
